Name: songquanpeng/one-api
Description: LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

Name: justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
Description: Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Codex, Grok, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!
